title: GetChangeSpecCoverage
description: Change review surfaces (Studio, future API) need per-spec implementation coverage for every spec in a change's scope. Callers should not manually load a change, iterate `specIds`, and invoke coverage queries. `GetChangeSpecCoverage` loads the change via `ChangeRepository` and aggregates `GetSpecCoverage` results.
context: Change review surfaces (Studio, future API) need per-spec implementation coverage for every spec in a change's scope. Callers should not manually load a change, iterate `specIds`, and invoke coverage queries. `GetChangeSpecCoverage` loads the change via `ChangeRepository` and aggregates `GetSpecCoverage` results.

rules:
`GetChangeSpecCoverage.execute(input)` MUST return `GetChangeSpecCoverageResult` with:

- `changeName: string`
- `specs: GetSpecCoverageResult[]` — one entry per `specId` on the change, in manifest declaration order
`GetChangeSpecCoverage` MUST load the change via `input.changes.get(input.changeName)`. When the change does not exist, it MUST throw `ChangeNotFoundError` from `@specd/core`.
For each `specId` on the loaded change, `GetChangeSpecCoverage` MUST delegate to `GetSpecCoverage.execute({ provider, specId })`.

`GetChangeSpecCoverageInput` MUST include:

- `provider: CodeGraphProvider` (already opened)
- `changes: ChangeRepository`
- `changeName: string`

The use case MUST NOT open or close the provider or mutate the change.
`createGetChangeSpecCoverage(getSpecCoverage: GetSpecCoverage)` in composition MUST inject `GetSpecCoverage` as a constructor dependency.

constraints: MUST NOT load change artifact content beyond what ChangeRepository.get returns for specIds.

scenarios.name: Change with multiple specs
given: a change with specIds [A, B] in declaration order
then: specs has two entries in [A, B] order
AND each entry matches GetSpecCoverage output for that spec

scenarios.name: Uses injected GetSpecCoverage
when: change coverage runs for two specs
then: GetSpecCoverage.execute is called once per specId

scenarios.name: Does not mutate change or graph
given: a loaded change and open provider
then: it only reads via ChangeRepository.get and provider queries

scenarios.name: Injects GetSpecCoverage
then: the returned instance delegates per-spec work to the injected use case
